rulings.Case Title: GERALDINE HILT et al VS. C.C. MOORE & CO. ENGINEERS et al
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MAY 29, 2012 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 1, Defendant Otis Elevator Co.¿s motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: LAVON HOELMER et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages Claims And Loss Of Consortium Claim
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR TUESDAY, MAY 29, 2012 IN DEPARTMENT 503 AT 9:30 A.M., LINE 4, Defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Co. Inc.¿s motion to strike punitive damages claims and loss of consortium claim is denied. Plaintiff¿s complaint sufficiently pleads a claim for punitive damages. LaVon Hoelmer¿s cause of action for loss of consortium is not duplicative of her claims as a wrongful death plaintiff. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:45am. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/TLJ)
